## Ticket

- [ ] One `TKT-NNN` owns this branch and its lanes/components are declared.
- [ ] This is a draft until offline checks and review are complete.

## Proof

- [ ] `npm run verify:offline` result attached or linked.
- [ ] Ticket `changes.md` and `verification.md` are updated honestly.
- [ ] Any live proof is separate, approved and recorded; this PR does not claim it from code alone.
